stemHtml: The location of the wing Centre of Pressure (CP) forward or aft of the CG, influences the...

options.a: Pitching moment, but it does NOT affect the magnitude of the stabiliser balancing force.
options.b: Pitching moment and consequently the direction of the stabiliser balancing force.
options.c: Tailplane arm and consequently the magnitude of the stabiliser balancing force.
options.d: Tailplane arm and consequently the direction of the stabiliser balancing force.
